note: Skill-routing corpus: given the 12 foundry skill descriptions, which single skill should a fresh model consult for each user message, or NONE (trivial, a non-foundry skill, or unrelated). Measures whether descriptions support correct routing — a proxy for live triggering, not skill activation. Categories: positive (should route to the named skill), recall_stress (positive phrased without the obvious keyword), keyword_trap (shares a keyword with a skill but routes elsewhere), near_miss_negative (adjacent to a skill but should not trigger), system_negative (unrelated or non-foundry).
